message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Panel Study Labour Market and Social Security (PASS), Wave 1-3, 2006-2008","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11084","justification":"German household and individual panel focusing on labour market status, unemployment, employment histories and social security; fielded 2006–2008 in Germany, directly relevant to employment in the 2000s."},{"title":"German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984-2011","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5684/soep.v28","justification":"Long-running German household panel including detailed employment, income, and occupation information as well as psychological scales; version covering years including the 2000s in Germany."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Work Orientations III – ISSP 2005","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Cross-national survey with a German sample on work orientations, employment conditions, and work-related attitudes; conducted in 2005, fits employment and psychological aspects of work in Germany in the 2000s."},{"title":"Working and Learning in a Changing World of Work 2006","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5188","justification":"German survey on work, employment conditions, organisational change and learning demands in companies; fielded in 2006 in Germany, directly related to employment and business organisation."},{"title":"Study on the Quality of Work in the Information and Communication Technology Sector 2004","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4054","justification":"German survey examining working conditions, employment, and organisational structures in ICT companies; conducted in Germany in the mid-2000s, relevant to business/industrial organisation and employment."},{"title":"German Job Satisfaction Survey 2001","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3707","justification":"Survey of employees in Germany focusing on job satisfaction, working conditions and psychological aspects of employment; conducted in 2001, squarely within the 2000s."},{"title":"Work-business Survey 2003","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3935","justification":"German survey on employment, workplace organisation and business processes; fielded in Germany in 2003, matching the employment and business/industrial management focus."},{"title":"BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2006","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5190","justification":"Germany-wide employment survey by BIBB and BAuA with detailed information on jobs, work tasks, organisational context, and perceived demands; year 2006, directly relevant to employment and organisational aspects."},{"title":"Mental Health and Employment in Germany 2002","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3910","justification":"German survey focusing on the relationship between employment status, workplace conditions and mental health; conducted in 2002 in Germany, connecting employment and psychology."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2006, Round 3 – Germany","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4873","justification":"ESS Round 3 includes the German sample with extensive modules on employment status, work conditions, and psychological well-being; conducted 2006, within the 2000s in Germany."}]}
